title: Sentiment supported by strong commodity imports into China
section_path: Sentiment supported by strong commodity imports into China
section_path_text: Sentiment supported by strong commodity imports into China
summary:
Main
The prospect of easing monetary policy helped boost sentiment across the commodity complex. However, this was offset by easing supply side issues. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2024-07-15 094502.png | assets/2024-07-15_sentiment-supported-by-strong-commodity-imports-into-china_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_d7c5807b3836.png

Market Commentary
Gold rallied late in the week as investor expectations of a rate cut by the Fed rose.

children.title: Main
children.summary: The prospect of easing monetary policy helped boost sentiment across the commodity complex. However, this was offset by easing supply side issues.

children.title: Market Commentary
children.summary: Gold rallied late in the week as investor expectations of a rate cut by the Fed rose. This was triggered by a flurry of economic data, including consumer prices, which have signalled a slowdown in inflation.
